testPlanDescription: Comprehensive test suite for all public pages - includes sanity checks, functional tests, navigation, pagination, search, and responsive design tests. Covers homepage, events, gallery, polls, calendar, pricing, sponsors, focus groups, MOSC pages, and charity theme.
additionalInstructions: Comprehensive test suite for all public pages. Test homepage, events listing and details, gallery with tabs, polls listing and details, calendar, pricing, sponsors listing and details, focus groups listing and details, MOSC pages, charity theme, navigation menu functionality, footer visibility, responsive design, search functionality, pagination, and event media galleries. Verify pages load without errors, components are visible, navigation works, and interactive features function correctly. Do NOT test admin pages, login flows, or authenticated user features. This is a comprehensive test suite covering both sanity checks and functional interactions.
notes: This comprehensive test plan includes 25 test cases covering all public pages and their functionality. Use this for full regression testing. For quick sanity checks, use public_pages_sanity_test_plan.json instead. Execute using: node scripts/run-public-pages-tests.js
